subject: Memorial Day Offer: Save 50% on a Digital Subscription for a Limited Time Only
body:
Memorial Day Offer: Save 50% on a Digital Subscription for a Limited
Time Only

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTfcqjB81HXJB86M7pAAwENc5r/viwb?t_params=CAMPAIGN_CODE%3D46JJL%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

DON'T MISS OUR MEMORIAL DAY SALE

SAVE 50% FOR 26 WEEKS
ON A DIGITAL SUBSCRIPTION

ENDS MAY 27

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTfcqjB81HXJB86M7pAAwENc5r/sub01

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Memorial Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage of 
big subscription savings. 

Save 50% for a full 26 weeks of a digital subscription, and get 
all the insights and inspiration that only The Times provides. 
You'll stay fully informed with the world's finest journalism. 

And when you subscribe now, you'll enjoy new benefits available 
only to subscribers: the NYT Now iPhone(R) app, for quick access 
to our editors' summaries of top stories and What We're Reading 
emails, with our journalists' recommendations of stories from 
around the web. 

Don't miss this opportunity to get exceptional savings on full 
access to NYTimes.com and NYTimes apps. 

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS MAY 27!*

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTfcqjB81HXJB86M7pAAwENc5r/sub02

*****

Get unlimited access to:

-- NYTimes.com

-- NYTimes apps

-- The new NYT Now app

-- What We're Reading emails

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTfcqjB81HXJB86M7pAAwENc5r/sub03

-----------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com. 

*This sale expires on May 28, 2014, 9 a.m. ET 

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not include 
Times Premier content, e-reader editions or digital versions of 
The New York Times Crossword. Other restrictions apply. 

Apple and the Apple logo are trademarks of Apple Inc., registered 
in the U.S. and other countries. iPhone is a trademark 
of Apple Inc. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTfcqjB81HXJB86M7pAAwENc5r/nyt

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTfcqjB81HXJB86M7pAAwENc5r/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Unsubscribe:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTfcqjB81HXJB86M7pAAwENc5r/unsub?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&REGI_ID=47275261

Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Memorial Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage of big subscription savings.

Save 50% for a full 26 weeks of a digital subscription, and get all the insights and inspiration that only The Times provides. You’ll stay fully informed with the world’s finest journalism.

And when you subscribe now, you’ll enjoy new benefits available only to subscribers: the NYT Now iPhone® app, for quick access to our editors’ summaries of top stories and What We’re Reading emails, with our journalists’ recommendations of stories from around the web.
